test-suite.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion

test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Prerequisites and Installation.Computer has expected name

test-case.description: AD Domain Services feature is installed

test-case.description: RSAT AD Tools feature is installed
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Prerequisites and Installation.RSAT AD Tools feature is installed

test-case.description: Internal network adapter is configured with static IP
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Prerequisites and Installation.Internal network adapter is configured with static IP
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Prerequisites and Installation.DNS points to localhost (127.0.0.1)

test-suite.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain Controller Services

test-case.description: Active Directory Domain Services is running
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain Controller Services.Active Directory Domain Services is running
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain Controller Services.DNS Server service is running
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain Controller Services.Netlogon service is running

test-case.description: Kerberos Key Distribution Center is running

test-case.description: File Replication Service or DFS Replication is running
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain Controller Services.File Replication Service or DFS Replication is running

test-suite.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration

test-case.description: Computer is part of the expected domain
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Computer is part of the expected domain
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Domain exists and is accessible

test-case.description: Forest exists and has correct name
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Forest exists and has correct name
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Domain has correct NetBIOS name
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Forest functional level is modern (2016+)
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.Domain functional level is modern (2016+)

test-case.description: This computer is a domain controller
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Domain and Forest Configuration.This computer is a domain controller

test-suite.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality
test-suite.description: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality

test-case.description: DNS zones are created for the domain
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality.DNS zones are created for the domain

test-case.description: Reverse DNS zone exists for internal subnet or PTR resolution works
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality.Reverse DNS zone exists for internal subnet or PTR resolution works

test-case.description: Domain controller has DNS A record
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality.Domain controller has DNS A record

test-case.description: Domain has NS record pointing to this DC
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality.Domain has NS record pointing to this DC

test-case.description: Can resolve domain name to IP
test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.DNS Functionality.Can resolve domain name to IP

Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Administrative Functionality.Domain Admins group exists
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Administrative Functionality.Default domain containers exist
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Administrative Functionality.SYSVOL share is accessible
Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Administrative Functionality.NETLOGON share is accessible

test-suite.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Health and Status Checks
test-suite.description: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Health and Status Checks

test-case.name: Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Health and Status Checks.Event logs show successful promotion

test-case.description: No recent critical errors in AD logs

Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) Promotion.Health and Status Checks.Domain controller can authenticate itself

test-suite.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell)
test-suite.description: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell)

test-suite.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements
test-suite.description: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements

test-case.description: Must be run from PowerShell 7 (pwsh) (this is the orchestration shell)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Must be run from PowerShell 7 (pwsh) (this is the orchestration shell)

test-case.description: Should be run as Administrator (recommended for meaningful preflight)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Should be run as Administrator (recommended for meaningful preflight)
COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Repo root contains Run_BuildMain.ps1 (orchestrator)

test-suite.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility)
test-suite.description: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility)

test-case.description: PSModulePath is set in PowerShell 7 (current process)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility).PSModulePath is set in PowerShell 7 (current process)

test-case.description: PSModulePath is set in Windows PowerShell 5.1
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility).PSModulePath is set in Windows PowerShell 5.1

test-suite.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Toolchain (PowerShell 7)
test-suite.description: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Toolchain (PowerShell 7)

test-case.description: DSC v3 CLI exists on PATH (dsc.exe)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Toolchain (PowerShell 7).DSC v3 CLI exists on PATH (dsc.exe)

failure.message: RuntimeException: DSC v3 CLI (dsc.exe) not found on PATH. NEXT STEP (do this first, then re-run Preflight): 1) Open PowerShell 7 as Administrator 2) From the REPO ROOT run: .\Run_BuildMain.ps1 3) Then re-run: Invoke-Pester -Path .\Tests\Pester\Preflight-Environment.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed DETAILS: The term 'dsc' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.

test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Toolchain (PowerShell 7).PSResourceGet is available (Microsoft.PowerShell.PSResourceGet)

test-suite.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).DSC resource modules (pinned + placed for adapter visibility)

test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).DSC resource modules (pinned + placed for adapter visibility).Canonical module root exists (C:\Program Files\WindowsPowerShell\Modules)

test-suite.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests
test-suite.description: Student Custom A* Validation Tests

test-suite.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Architectural OUs and Groups (RBAC) Validation
test-suite.description: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Architectural OUs and Groups (RBAC) Validation

test-case.description: Validates that the IT-Admins OU exists for Privileged Identity Management
test-case.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Architectural OUs and Groups (RBAC) Validation.Validates that the IT-Admins OU exists for Privileged Identity Management

failure.message: Expected a value, because The IT-Admins OU is required for the A* Tiered administration model., but got $null or empty.
failure.stack-trace: at $ou | Should -Not -BeNullOrEmpty -Because "The IT-Admins OU is required for the A* Tiered administration model.", C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:20 at <ScriptBlock>, C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:20

test-case.description: Validates that the GG-IT-Admins global security group exists
test-case.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Architectural OUs and Groups (RBAC) Validation.Validates that the GG-IT-Admins global security group exists

test-suite.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Fine-Grained Password Policy (FGPP) Validation
test-suite.description: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Fine-Grained Password Policy (FGPP) Validation

test-case.description: Validates that the FGPP for IT Admins exists and enforces complexity
test-case.name: Student Custom A* Validation Tests.Fine-Grained Password Policy (FGPP) Validation.Validates that the FGPP for IT Admins exists and enforces complexity

failure.message: Expected a value, because FGPP-ITAdmins must be configured for the A* Security Requirement., but got $null or empty.
failure.stack-trace: at $fgpp | Should -Not -BeNullOrEmpty -Because "FGPP-ITAdmins must be configured for the A* Security Requirement.", C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:36 at <ScriptBlock>, C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:36

test-case.description: Validates that the Baseline Security GPO exists

failure.message: Expected a value, because The Baseline Security GPO must exist., but got $null or empty.
failure.stack-trace: at $gpo | Should -Not -BeNullOrEmpty -Because "The Baseline Security GPO must exist.", C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:47 at <ScriptBlock>, C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:47

test-case.description: Validates that the Derby Regional Policy exists

failure.message: Expected a value, because The Derby Regional Policy GPO must exist., but got $null or empty.
failure.stack-trace: at $gpo | Should -Not -BeNullOrEmpty -Because "The Derby Regional Policy GPO must exist.", C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:54 at <ScriptBlock>, C:\Users\Administrator\BarmBuzz\Tests\Pester\Student.Tests.ps1:54

test-suite.name: Proof-of-Life (DSC created files)
test-suite.description: Proof-of-Life (DSC created files)

test-case.name: Proof-of-Life (DSC created files).C:\\TEST directory exists

failure.message: Expected $true, because C:\TEST directory doesn't exist - DSC hasn't created it yet! HINT: Add a File resource to your StudentConfig.ps1: File CreateTestDirectory { DestinationPath = 'C:\TEST' Type = 'Directory' Ensure = 'Present' } Then run: .\Run_BuildMain.ps1, but got $false.

test-case.name: Proof-of-Life (DSC created files).C:\\TEST\\test.txt exists

failure.message: Expected $true, because C:\TEST\test.txt doesn't exist - DSC hasn't created it yet! HINT: Add a File resource to your StudentConfig.ps1: File CreateTestFile { DestinationPath = 'C:\TEST\test.txt' Type = 'File' Ensure = 'Present' Contents = 'Proof-of-life: DSC created this file.' DependsOn = '[File]CreateTestDirectory' } Then run: .\Run_BuildMain.ps1, but got $false.

test-case.name: Proof-of-Life (DSC created files).test.txt has expected contents

failure.message: ParameterBindingException: Parameter set cannot be resolved using the specified named parameters. One or more parameters issued cannot be used together or an insufficient number of parameters were provided.
